questions.question: What type of animal, named "Frederico," was leading the polls in a Pilar, Brazil mayoral race when he died unexpectedly in 1996?
What city did Pat Robertson say might face terrorists, tornadoes and "possibly a meteor," to avenge Gay Days at a theme park in 1998?
What's the largest whale with teeth?
What's the American version of what the British hospitality trade calls a "chucker-out"?
How many compartments were in the first TV dinner?
